channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Francis Atwoli Explains How He Took His Daughter Out of Nairobi During 2024 Gen Z Protests
item.description: During the 2024 anti-Finance Bill protests in Nairobi, chaos erupted as demonstrators overwhelmed security and breached the Parliament Buildings. Several MPs had to evacuate, and part of the building ...

item.title: Residents Ordered to Evacuate in Rural Municipality of Shellbrook Due to Safety Concerns
item.description: Authorities in the Rural Municipality (RM) of Shellbrook have issued an official evacuation order for residents due to ongoing safety risks. Local officials are coordinating with emergency services to...

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explosion delays NASA lunar plans and boosts SpaceX reliance
item.description: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on its launchpad at Cape Canaveral on Thursday evening, causing significant damage and raising concerns over the United States’ lunar ambitions. The fiery incid...

item.title: Pam Bondi shifts responsibility to Todd Blanche during House Oversight Committee hearing on Epstein files
item.description: During a recent House Oversight Committee hearing, former U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi addressed concerns regarding the handling of Epstein-related documents. Bondi claimed that the Department of J...

item.title: Damaged crane keeps 10 Penticton properties under evacuation after major construction-site fire
item.description: A major fire at a long-term care home construction site in Penticton, British Columbia, has left several residents displaced as authorities continue to manage safety risks caused by a damaged construc...

item.title: White House physician reports Trump is in excellent health following comprehensive medical examination
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has been declared to be in “excellent health” and fully fit to continue serving as commander in chief, according to a report released by his physician following a medical e...

item.title: Port-Harcourt to host 2026 NWFL Super Six finals with six top women’s teams
item.description: Port-Harcourt, Rivers State capital, don set for 2026 Nigeria Women’s Football League (NWFL) Super Six finals wey go run from May 5 to June 14. This na di first time di city go host dis top-level comp...

item.title: New Filipino animated series 'Agos, Ang Batang Isla' aims to reconnect children with local culture and language
item.description: The article introduces ‘Agos, Ang Batang Isla’, a new Filipino animated series designed to give children a more culturally rooted and relatable character in media. Created by Jacque Manabat of Amber S...

item.title: Pakistan maintains firm stance on Israel-Palestine issue amid Abraham Accords discussions
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar on Friday emphasised that Pakistan will not change its longstanding position regarding Israel until a fully independent Palestinian state is establ...

item.title: Senior Congress Leader K.P. Dhanapalan Passes Away at 76 in Kerala
item.description: Senior Congress leader and former Member of Parliament, K.P. Dhanapalan, passed away on Saturday, May 30, 2026, at Paravur, Kochi, Kerala. He was 76 years old. He was admitted to a private hospital ea...

item.title: Neo-colonial structures continue to shape Africa’s economy and global position, argues opinion piece
item.description: The opinion article examines arguments made by Tunisian-American political economist Professor Fadhel Kaboub regarding the enduring legacy of colonialism in Africa, framing it as ongoing neo-colonial ...

item.title: China objects to Japan-Philippines talks on maritime boundary delimitation
item.description: China has strongly criticised the decision of Japan and the Philippines to begin formal discussions on delimiting their maritime boundary, calling the move “illegal” and invalid. The talks were announ...

item.title: Tinubu Explains Fuel Subsidy Removal Helped Nigeria Avoid Bankruptcy and Boost Economy
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don yan say removing fuel subsidy na one tough decision wey dem do to save Nigeria from wahala wey fit make the country go bankrupt. During one meeting with state governors for t...

item.title: Vivid Sydney replaces remaining drone shows with fireworks after technical failure
item.description: Vivid Sydney has confirmed that all remaining drone light shows for its 2026 festival have been cancelled following a significant technical incident earlier in the week. During Monday night’s Star-Bou...

item.title: Authorities outline reforms and investigation updates following NEET exam leak concerns
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) and senior government officials have informed a parliamentary committee about ongoing steps to address concerns arising from recent NEET exam irregularities and paper...

item.title: Lawyers raise concerns over biometric verification system in Punjab courts
item.description: LAHORE: Lawyers across Punjab have expressed strong dissatisfaction with the mandatory biometric verification system for filing court cases. Introduced in January and effective from March 2026, the sy...

item.title: Tom Morello, Serj Tankian and Roman Morello release new protest single ‘Adjourn It’
item.description: Tom Morello has released a new politically charged single titled ‘Adjourn It’, featuring System Of A Down frontman Serj Tankian and Morello’s 15-year-old son, Roman Morello. The track forms part of Mo...

item.title: Judge orders Trump to respond to fraud allegations linked to IRS settlement deal
item.description: A U.S. federal judge has ordered President Donald Trump to respond to serious allegations that a recent settlement with the Internal Revenue Service may have involved fraud on the court. The order was...

item.title: CBN extends PoS geo-fencing compliance deadline to August 2026 and adjusts terminal regulations
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has shifted the enforcement date for its mandatory Point of Sale (PoS) terminal geo-fencing policy, giving payment service providers more time to comply with the requ...

item.title: Rapid Deployment, Not AI, Is Driving Fintech Security and Efficiency
item.description: In the evolving landscape of fintech, speed of deployment has emerged as the critical factor for operational survival, rather than artificial intelligence. While AI can accelerate both innovation and ...
